summary: P0-P3 Bug Fix Verification Complete - All fixes working correctly

P0_IB_pushed_data_endpoint.details: Endpoint returns valid JSON structure with connected:false when IB Data Pusher is not running (expected behavior per test requirements)

P1_ticker_modal_not_appearing.fix_description: handleTickerClick now passes object {symbol, quote: {}, fromClick: true} to setSelectedTicker instead of just string
P1_ticker_modal_not_appearing.test_result: TickerDetailModal opens correctly when clicking ticker in watchlist. Modal shows NVDA with Grade C, Strong BULLISH bias, Trading Analysis, AI Trading Recommendation, Buy/Short buttons

P2_watchlist_0_flicker.fix_description: Added initialLoadComplete state flag. Count ({watchlist.length}/{max_size}) only shows when initialLoadComplete is true. Shows spinner instead during initial load
P2_watchlist_0_flicker.test_result: Smart Watchlist shows spinner during load, then shows count (5/50) after data loads. No '(0)' flicker observed in testing

P3_accuracy_indicator_placeholder.fix_description: Added accuracyLoading state. Accuracy indicator wrapped with {!accuracyLoading && (...)} to hide during loading
P3_accuracy_indicator_placeholder.test_result: No '-- accuracy' placeholder visible. Accuracy shows '80% accuracy' after data loads

AICoachTab_handleTickerClick.code: const handleTickerClick = (tickerOrObject) => { const symbol = typeof tickerOrObject === 'string' ? tickerOrObject : tickerOrObject?.symbol; if (symbol) { setChartSymbol(symbol); setSelectedTicker({ symbol, quote: {}, fromClick: true }); } };

context_for_next_testing_agent: All P0-P3 bug fixes verified working: (P0) /api/ib/pushed-data returns valid JSON, (P1) Ticker clicks open TickerDetailModal correctly by passing object to setSelectedTicker, (P2) Watchlist uses initialLoadComplete flag to prevent '(0)' flicker, (P3) Accuracy indicator uses accuracyLoading state to hide during load. User's IB Data Pusher not running is expected - endpoint still returns proper structure.
